# Holo Forensics v0.1.3

## ✨ What's Changed

- Added Windows Jump Lists collection support.
- Added VSS-backed Prefetch collection support.
- Added Windows LNK collection support.
- Added Recycle Bin collection support.
- Added Scheduled Tasks collection support.
- Added PowerShell activity collection support.
- Updated README screenshots so release assets stay theme-aware.
- Removed unsupported collection scope cards from the desktop workflow.

## 🧪 Release Notes

- This release expands Windows collection coverage across shell artifacts, execution evidence, scheduled tasks, and user activity.
- The desktop scope review and release assets were also tightened up to reflect the currently supported collection surface.
